description_long: This object consists of two rectangular, box-like cabinets placed side by side, each with a clean, modern design. The exterior surfaces are finished in a dark wood grain, giving the object a sophisticated and urban appearance. The front and side panels are smooth and flat, with no visible handles, knobs, or decorative elements, suggesting a minimalist style. The tops of the cabinets are flat and could serve as surfaces for placing items. The visible faces are solid, with no glass panels or open shelving, and there are no visible doors or drawers. The object appears sturdy and is likely constructed from wood or wood composite materials.
description: A pair of dark wood grain, rectangular cabinets with smooth, flat surfaces and a minimalist, handle-free design. The tops are flat and suitable for supporting objects.
description_view_0: Front view showing two boxy cabinets with smooth, light-colored front panels and dark sides.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the dark wood grain tops and the staggered positioning of the cabinets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, dark-colored back panels of both cabinets.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again showing the wood grain tops and the relative height difference.
